positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration of a celestial journey: a crescent moon, stylized planets, and a stylized, winged nebula creature gently flying through deep space. The style should be bold vector art meets detailed watercolor wash, emphasizing clean silhouettes and high contrast. The composition must be centered and vertically balanced, suitable for a T-shirt graphic. Color palette should be deep indigo, electric teal, soft gold, and cosmic lavender. Lighting should be dramatic, emanating from the nebula itself, creating glowing outlines. Print-friendly, vector-quality edges, seamless repeat suitability, isolated graphic on a transparent background.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, lowres, messy, complex background, poor anatomy, extra limbs, photographic, photorealism, graffiti, logo, trademark
